query:
ALTER TABLE platform_settings 
  CHANGE COLUMN stripePublicKey wompiPublicKey text,
  CHANGE COLUMN stripeSecretKey wompiPrivateKey text,
  CHANGE COLUMN stripeWebhookSecret wompiIntegritySecret text,
  CHANGE COLUMN stripeTestMode wompiTestMode boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  ADD COLUMN wompiEventsSecret text AFTER wompiIntegritySecret;
